title: QuickPing
description: Useful Client-Side Block Markers for Clear Highlighting
body:
[![AshCraft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a75887d69106ed9eb2dd595176121f279523f184_0.webp)](https://www.ashcraft.cz/)

This mod adds a clean, client-side ping system that lets you quickly mark blocks for yourself with a single middle-click. When you look at a block and ping it, a bright wireframe outline appears exactly around that block, helping you keep track of important spots while building, exploring, or recording gameplay. The ping is visible only to you and never sent to the server, making it perfect for single-player worlds, private notes, or content creators who want to highlight structures or points of interest during videos. Lightweight, non-intrusive, and fully client-side — a simple visual tool to improve focus, planning, and clarity.
